I found the README.md file in the webapp project. Here are all the API endpoints mentioned:

## API Endpoints

1. **`GET /api/users`** — List all users
2. **`POST /api/users`** — Create a new user  
3. **`GET /api/health`** — Health check

These three endpoints are documented in the "Endpoints" section of the README.md file located at `projects/webapp/docs/README.md`.
